requirement_topic.en: Local Importer / Authorised Agent (Tanzanian Company Required)
requirement_topic.zh: 本地进口商／授权代理（须为坦桑尼亚注册公司）
requirement_topic.zht: 本地進口商／授權代理（須為坦尚尼亞註冊公司）

summary.en: A locally registered Tanzanian company acting as importer or authorised agent is required for TCRA type approval registration and market entry of wireless and telecommunications devices. The Tanzanian importer or agent must be registered with the Tanzania Business Registrations and Licensing Agency (BRELA) and recognised by TCRA. The importer is responsible for ensuring that imported devices carry a valid TCRA type approval certificate and that all TBS/TZS compliance documentation is in order. The importer also bears responsibility for TRA customs clearance, applicable import duties, and post-market compliance obligations in Tanzania.
summary.zh: 无线及电信设备的TCRA型式批准注册及市场准入须委任在坦桑尼亚本地注册的公司担任进口商或授权代理。坦桑尼亚进口商或代理须在坦桑尼亚企业注册及许可机构（BRELA）注册并获TCRA认可。进口商须确保进口设备持有有效的TCRA型式批准证书，且所有TBS/TZS合规文件完备。进口商还须负责坦桑尼亚税务局（TRA）海关清关、适用进口关税及坦桑尼亚市场上市后合规义务。
summary.zht: 無線及電信設備的TCRA型式批准註冊及市場准入須委任在坦尚尼亞本地註冊的公司擔任進口商或授權代理。坦尚尼亞進口商或代理須在坦尚尼亞企業註冊及許可機構（BRELA）註冊並獲TCRA認可。進口商須確保進口設備持有有效的TCRA型式批准證書，且所有TBS/TZS合規文件完備。進口商還須負責坦尚尼亞稅務局（TRA）海關清關、適用進口關稅及坦尚尼亞市場上市後合規義務。

standards_or_laws: Electronic and Postal Communications Act (EPOCA) 2010 (Tanzania) — importer and dealer registration
Tanzania Business Registrations and Licensing Agency (BRELA) Act
TCRA Type Approval Guidelines — authorised importer/agent requirements

summary.en: China has no domestic equivalent to the Tanzania local importer or authorised agent requirement for market entry of wireless devices. For China-domestic sales, the manufacturer or a domestic distributor handles SRRC/NAL/CCC registration without a requirement for a locally incorporated Tanzanian entity. Chinese exporters must identify and appoint a Tanzanian-registered company recognised by TCRA before applying for TCRA type approval or importing into Tanzania.
summary.zh: 中国国内没有与坦桑尼亚本地进口商或授权代理要求等同的制度用于无线设备市场准入。对于国内销售，制造商或国内经销商办理SRRC/NAL/CCC注册，无需委任坦桑尼亚本地注册实体。中国出口商须在申请TCRA型式批准或进口到坦桑尼亚前，确定并委任获TCRA认可的坦桑尼亚注册公司。
summary.zht: 中國國內沒有與坦尚尼亞本地進口商或授權代理要求等同的制度用於無線設備市場准入。對於國內銷售，製造商或國內經銷商辦理SRRC/NAL/CCC註冊，無需委任坦尚尼亞本地註冊實體。中國出口商須在申請TCRA型式批准或進口到坦尚尼亞前，確定並委任獲TCRA認可的坦尚尼亞註冊公司。

standards_or_laws: No China-domestic equivalent; SRRC/NAL/CCC registration (China) covers domestic market entry only

gap.en: No China-domestic process maps to the Tanzania local importer or authorised agent requirement. A Tanzanian-registered company must be appointed as importer or authorised agent and recognised by TCRA before TCRA type approval registration can proceed. This entity is also responsible for TRA customs clearance and ongoing compliance with TCRA and TBS/TZS obligations in Tanzania.
gap.zh: 中国国内流程不涵盖坦桑尼亚本地进口商或授权代理要求。须在TCRA型式批准注册程序启动前委任获TCRA认可的坦桑尼亚注册公司担任进口商或授权代理。该实体还须负责TRA海关清关及在坦桑尼亚持续履行TCRA和TBS/TZS合规义务。
gap.zht: 中國國內流程不涵蓋坦尚尼亞本地進口商或授權代理要求。須在TCRA型式批准註冊程序啟動前委任獲TCRA認可的坦尚尼亞註冊公司擔任進口商或授權代理。該實體還須負責TRA海關清關及在坦尚尼亞持續履行TCRA和TBS/TZS合規義務。

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A locally registered Tanzanian company acting as importer or authorised agent is mandatory for TCRA type approval registration and market entry of wireless and telecommunications devices in Tanzania. There is no China-domestic equivalent. The appointed entity must be recognised by TCRA and is responsible for TRA customs clearance and maintaining ongoing regulatory compliance in Tanzania.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 坦桑尼亚本地注册公司担任进口商或授权代理，是TCRA型式批准注册及无线和电信设备进入坦桑尼亚市场的强制要求。中国国内无等同制度。所委任的实体须获TCRA认可，并负责TRA海关清关及持续维护在坦桑尼亚的监管合规。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 坦尚尼亞本地註冊公司擔任進口商或授權代理，是TCRA型式批准註冊及無線和電信設備進入坦尚尼亞市場的強制要求。中國國內無等同制度。所委任的實體須獲TCRA認可，並負責TRA海關清關及持續維護在坦尚尼亞的監管合規。
